message:
fix(watch): replace direct Tokio calls in orphan_reaper with runtime_compat

orphan_reaper.rs used tokio::time::sleep and tokio::process::Command
directly, panicking when no Tokio reactor is present under the
asupersync runtime. Replace with runtime-agnostic equivalents.

Also gate signal registration on runtime capability — log a warning
instead of panicking when the runtime doesn't support signals (Phase 0).

Closes #41

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
